lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in fair condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and corrosion, and the interior is heavily worn. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be functional.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, mint condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior paint is flawless, with no chips, scratches, or swirl marks, and the body panels are perfectly straight. The interior is equally pristine, with the leather upholstery and trim showing virtually no signs of use. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a complete service history and all systems functioning as new. Garage-kept and pampered since day one, this car offers a showroom-quality experience for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as a project car or for parts. It currently has significant mechanical issues, including a non-functional transmission and an engine that requires a complete overhaul to be roadworthy again. The exterior shows substantial wear, with noticeable rust on the quarter panels and fading paint throughout. Inside, the upholstery is torn in several places and the electronics are intermittent. This is an ideal candidate for a dedicated restorer or someone looking for a donor vehicle, but it is not currently in driving condition.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and style with this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition, showing just the expected minor wear from careful use, and it's ready to provide many more miles of dependable driving. This is a fantastic choice for anyone looking for a solid, high-quality car that has been looked after with care.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor scratches and no significant damage. The interior is well-maintained with light wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in working order.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience synonymous with its lineage. Our rigorous multi-point inspection confirms its readiness for immediate service, providing a sophisticated balance of luxury and proven reliability. This offering constitutes an exceptional value proposition within its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner right away! It's super reliable and perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway. Come take a look, I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically robust, it has undergone critical preventive maintenance including a VANOS system refresh and subframe
Used vehicle. Good condition. Engine runs smooth. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed.

This meticulously maintained sedan strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, superficial road wear expected of a well-cared-for vehicle. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring supple leather seating, polished trim, and a high-fidelity sound system that functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent professional inspection confirming the engine and transmission are smooth and responsive. From the responsive handling to the ice-cold dual-zone climate control, every feature works exactly as intended. This is a reliable, turnkey vehicle that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and optimal road performance. Offering a harmonious balance of luxury and utility, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This executive-grade automobile has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and comprehensive features, this represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking quality and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been absolutely wonderful to own. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a road trip, it runs like a charm and is ready to hit the road with a new owner today. You’re going to love how it drives!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving masterpiece, powered by the S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The longitudinal chassis remains rigid with a documented rear subframe reinforcement, addressing the platform's primary structural concern. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional traction through the apex. Recent service includes a valve clearance adjustment and a cooling system overhaul with a high-flow water pump. Suspension geometry is maintained with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, providing the tactile steering feedback and lateral stability expected of a driver-spec machine. While showing minor patina consistent with its mileage, the powertrain remains potent and the redline shifts are as visceral as ever.
Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well. Regularly maintained. No accidents.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor stone chips expected from careful road use, and the alloy wheels are free of major curbing. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of cleanliness; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, while every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, having followed a strict service schedule with recent fluid flushes and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. It drives straight and true, with a responsive engine and smooth-shifting transmission. This is an ideal choice for a discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine care by its previous owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, currently offered in prime operational condition. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, this vehicle represents an exceptional investment for the discerning driver who demands both performance and reliability. We invite you to experience the superior road presence and engineering excellence of this distinguished model.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, this automobile offers reliable performance and a superior driving experience. It represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a dream to drive. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable car that still looks and feels great on the road. I’ve taken care of it like one of the family, so you’re getting a real gem here. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS for precise valve timing. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a mechanical limited-slip differential. The chassis benefits from a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded poly-bushings, maintaining the legendary handling characteristics of the MacPherson strut and multi-link suspension setup. While showing minor cosmetic wear typical of a well-enjoyed machine, the mechanical vitals remain robust with a recently serviced cooling system and recent valve adjustment.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. Runs well. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and performance for the discerning driver. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor, honest road wear consistent with careful use and garage storage. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is well-preserved, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts with precision, and the suspension remains firm and quiet. This is a dependable, turnkey car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained specimen represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating robust mechanical integrity and a refined interior, the vehicle has been preserved to a commendable standard. It offers a balanced synthesis of performance and sophisticated presentation, ensuring a superior ownership experience for those who value long-term reliability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and a robust mechanical profile, it delivers reliable performance without compromise. The interior and exterior maintain a refined aesthetic, reflecting a standard of care that distinguishes it from its peers. We invite serious inquiries to experience this exceptional value firsthand.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride that’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super well-maintained, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend road trips. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner who will love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'm happy to chat!

This E46 M3 remains a benchmark of analog performance, powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for optimized valve timing. The 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox provides crisp engagement, feeding power through an M-variable differential lock. The chassis has been maintained with a focus on structural integrity, including documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension setup with polyurethane bushings. While the exterior shows the character of a well-driven machine, the mechanical vitals—including compression and leak-down figures—are robust, ensuring this driver-focused example is ready for the canyon roads.
Used car in good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, blending reliable performance with a clean, sophisticated aesthetic. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor signs of careful use, such as small stone chips consistent with highway commuting. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium upholstery is free of tears or significant wear, and the dashboard remains pristine with all digital interfaces and climate controls functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. With a complete service history, recent fluid flushes, and tires with substantial tread remaining, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a fusion of performance and reliability. Presenting in superior mechanical and aesthetic condition, this automobile has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for excellence and longevity. Offering a refined driving experience and a commanding presence, it remains an exemplary choice for those who demand quality without compromise.
